# `pdf/worker/engines/VectorEngine.ts`

## 📋 Purpose

Extracts vector paths (lines, curves, rectangles, clips) from PDF operator streams, converting to SVG-compatible path data.

> **Source file:** `src/pdf/worker/engines/VectorEngine.ts`
